professional_summary: Product manager with 7 years of experience leading B2B SaaS products from 0-to-1 and scaling to $50M+ ARR. Expert at translating customer insights into prioritized roadmaps, driving cross-functional alignment through OKRs, and delivering measurable outcomes through A/B testing and data-driven iteration.

work_experience.title: Senior Product Manager
bullets: Owned end-to-end product roadmap for core analytics product serving 400+ enterprise customers, growing NPS from 32 to 61
Defined and tracked OKRs across 3 engineering squads, achieving 87% of quarterly goals for 6 consecutive quarters
Led go-to-market strategy for 2 major feature launches, driving 22% increase in annual contract value (ACV)
Ran 40+ A/B tests using Amplitude and Mixpanel, iterating on onboarding flow to improve activation rate by 31%
Wrote PRDs and user stories in Confluence and Jira, maintaining backlog of 300+ features with clear prioritization framework

work_experience.title: Product Manager
bullets: Launched 0-to-1 integration marketplace with 15 third-party connectors, contributing $3M in new ARR within 9 months
Conducted 80+ user research interviews to define personas and validate product hypothesis before development
Managed stakeholder management across engineering, design, sales, and customer success teams of 30+ people
Applied Design Thinking to redesign core workflow, reducing user task completion time by 45%

work_experience.title: Associate Product Manager
bullets: Assisted in sprint planning and backlog grooming for Agile team of 8 engineers using Scrum methodology
Built SQL dashboards in Looker to track product KPIs and feature adoption across customer cohorts
Coordinated product lifecycle from ideation to launch for 5 features, each delivered on schedule
Created Figma wireframes and collaborated with design team to prototype new user flows

projects.name: ProductCompass Blog
projects.description: Weekly product management newsletter with 5,000+ subscribers covering roadmapping and prioritization frameworks
